final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: illustration-traditional
Asset type: Chinese traditional gongbi heavy-color painting (工笔重彩画), panoramic scroll composition
Primary request: grand "Hundred Birds Paying Homage to the Phoenix" (百鸟朝凤) scene rendered in meticulous Chinese gongbi brushwork
Scene/backdrop: celestial mountain landscape shrouded in billowing clouds and rosy mists (云蒸霞蔚), ancient pines and emerald cypresses, exotic flowers and rare grasses scattered throughout
Subject: a pair of soaring phoenixes at the center — the male phoenix (雄凤) with vermilion, golden yellow, and emerald green plumage; the female phoenix (雌凤) with pink-violet, silver-white, and azure-blue plumage, the two phoenixes echoing each other amid clouds and sunset glows; surrounding them dozens of rare and auspicious birds in varied poses: peacock spreading its full tail, cranes dancing gracefully, golden pheasants foraging, parrots playing — all rendered with lifelike vitality
Style/medium: Chinese traditional gongbi heavy-color painting (工笔重彩), fine and fluid ink outlines, rich and resplendent mineral pigments, gold powder detailing feather textures
Composition/framing: panoramic full-scroll composition (全景式构图), centered dual phoenixes with birds radiating outward, balanced and symmetrical grandeur
Lighting/mood: luminous celestial atmosphere, warm golden radiance emanating from the phoenixes, auspicious and majestic
Color palette: vermilion, golden yellow, emerald green (male phoenix); pink-violet, silver-white, azure-blue (female phoenix); rich mineral pigment tones throughout — malachite green, azurite blue, cinnabar red, gold accents
Materials/textures: fine silk or paper ground, layered mineral pigment washes, gold powder (金粉) outlining individual feather details, precise ink-line brushwork
Constraints: maintain authentic gongbi heavy-color painting aesthetic; gold powder feather detailing must be visible; all bird species rendered with distinct and accurate postures
Avoid: Western oil painting style, impressionistic loose brushwork, photorealistic rendering, flat cartoon style
